meta.project: Magic Agents Operator Workspace UI port

stories.title: Scaffold the React + TypeScript + Vite frontend
stories.notes: Created ui/ React 19 + TypeScript + Vite workspace, npm lockfile, Vite proxy, and FastAPI handoff to built static/ui assets.

stories.title: Establish a typed API client and query layer
stories.notes: Added typed API adapters, SSE parsing utilities, TanStack Query hooks, and intake/bootstrap queries that run in parallel.

stories.title: Build the application shell and provider stack
stories.notes: Mounted a provider-backed three-pane shell with RouterProvider, QueryClientProvider, error boundary, and not-found handling.

stories.title: Establish the tokenized visual system and typography rules
stories.notes: Defined graphite/bone/signal tokens, typography scales, motion tokens, and non-blocking local font-face declarations.

stories.title: Build accessible UI primitives for the workspace
stories.notes: Shipped typed Button, Badge, Text, Mono, Divider, Skeleton, EmptyState, Panel, and SectionHeader primitives with focus/loading coverage.

stories.title: Implement the three-pane workspace layout
stories.notes: Shipped a divider-led three-pane shell with a dominant center workspace and independent scroll regions for intake, work, and evidence.

stories.title: Add the sticky phase rail and session status strip
stories.notes: Added a sticky session strip and full seven-phase rail tied to live session phase metadata without fake completion state.

stories.title: Replace screen jumps with panel state transitions
stories.notes: Moved center and inspector changes into in-place search-param transitions with focus handoff instead of route thrash.

stories.title: Add a top bar with session context and workspace controls
stories.notes: Introduced a stable top bar showing product identity, story context, workspace phase context, and panel controls.

stories.title: Support panel collapse, persistence, and responsive fallbacks
stories.notes: Added desktop collapse persistence, tablet inspector overlays, mobile pane switching, and defensive storage fallbacks for constrained runtimes.

stories.title: Unify Jira intake and manual entry in the left rail
stories.notes: Rebuilt the left rail as a two-mode intake workflow with explicit Jira loading/configuration/empty states, deferred local filtering, Jira ticket hydration into a normalized story model, and shared manual/Jira session-start normalization covered by Vitest component tests.

stories.title: Start, resume, and recover sessions from checkpoints
stories.notes: Added checkpoint lookup and resume endpoints, resumable left-rail affordances, explicit fresh-start actions, and controlled resume-failure handling with backend and frontend integration coverage.

stories.title: Model session state in React without UI drift
stories.notes: Centralized confirmed session metadata, preserved per-session draft feedback across pane switches and refreshes, and tightened query invalidation so only session-related surfaces refresh.

stories.title: Render a phase-aware acceptance criteria checklist
stories.notes: Rendered compact AC rail items with selection, classification, verdict state, and long-text truncation while keeping active story context synchronized across workspace panes.

stories.title: Display a left-rail phase progress timeline
stories.notes: Added a seven-phase left-rail timeline tied to backend-confirmed progress with distinct pending, active, and complete states plus phase-selection propagation into the center workspace.

stories.title: Surface session health and usage telemetry
stories.notes: Surfaced compact session health telemetry with available, warning, and unavailable states using backend usage metadata and targeted Vitest coverage.

epics.title: Active Phase Workspace and Negotiation Loop

stories.title: Render each phase as a structured review surface
stories.notes: Added phase-aware review formatters and summary-first renderers for all seven negotiation phases with raw-payload fallback details instead of generic JSON dumping.

stories.title: Add inline approve and revise actions
stories.notes: Connected inline approve/revise controls to `/api/respond`, kept feedback in the center pane, and surfaced loading, success, and error state beside the action row.

stories.title: Surface clarifying questions and phase transitions cleanly
stories.notes: Rendered clarifying questions as a distinct review region and kept phase advancement in-place with transition-backed session updates and prior phase access through the mini-rail.

stories.title: Render the conversation transcript for the active phase
stories.notes: Added a role-aware transcript with system/operator/model distinction, bottom-pin auto-scroll, and pause-on-scroll-up behavior driven from session events and negotiation history.

stories.title: Add a sticky phase mini-rail and breadcrumb context
stories.notes: Upgraded the sticky center rail into a breadcrumbed mini-navigation spine with completed-phase reopening, numeric quick jumps, and input-focus suppression for shortcuts.

stories.title: Build a tabbed inspector for evidence surfaces
stories.notes: Expanded the persistent right rail to evidence, scan, traceability, and planning/critique tabs, preserved center-pane draft state across inspector changes, lazy-loaded the heavier analyst surface, and kept the idle evidence view to a compact prompt so the inspector stays visually secondary before session start.

stories.title: Integrate codebase scan output into the inspector
stories.notes: Added in-workspace scan launch, editable project-root targeting, progress/error/success rendering, readable persisted summaries, and backend rehydration through `/api/scan/status`.

stories.title: Render per-AC traceability as linked evidence
stories.notes: Shipped a per-AC traceability browser plus matrix view, AC-linked evidence chains, copyable verification refs, and shared AC selection that keeps traceability subordinate to the active workspace.

stories.title: Expose planner, critique, and spec diff as analyst tools
stories.notes: Wired planner, phase-critique, and spec-diff endpoints into the inspector as on-demand analyst tools with explicit empty states for missing historical comparisons.

stories.title: Add a spec contract viewer in the inspector
stories.notes: Added a structured spec contract viewer beside raw YAML, surfaced immutable requirement IDs and verification routing, and linked requirement selection back to the originating acceptance criterion.

stories.title: Integrate the EARS approval gate and execution controls
stories.notes: Added a session-scoped verification console in the center pane, surfaced backend approval metadata, and enforced the EARS gate in both the React controls and FastAPI execution endpoints.

stories.title: Add artifact viewers for specs and generated tests
stories.notes: Added inline spec YAML and generated-test viewers with revisit-friendly tabs, mono file refs, and long-content handling without leaving the workspace.

stories.title: Stream pipeline execution as a live console
stories.notes: Implemented `/api/pipeline/stream` SSE events for compile, generate, run, evaluate, and completion states, then rendered them as an in-place live console with durable final status.

stories.title: Present verdicts and Jira feedback in one post-run surface
stories.notes: Added post-run summaries, per-AC verdict details with evidence refs, Jira configuration gating, and session-scoped Jira feedback results in the verification console.

stories.title: Establish the visual system and typography rules
stories.notes: Added a typed graphite/bone/signal design-system source mirrored into CSS variables, tightened shell and rail surfaces, and preserved mono typography for refs and artifacts only.

stories.title: Make the workspace accessible for keyboard and screen-reader users
stories.notes: Added shell announcements, busy/log semantics, focus handoff after session/phase/pipeline transitions, and stronger visible focus treatment across primary controls.

stories.title: Add restrained motion and responsive refinement
stories.notes: Introduced shared motion tokens, reduced-motion fallbacks, calmer pane transitions, and responsive chrome refinements without disturbing the existing mobile/tablet pane model.

stories.title: Add component, integration, and contract tests for the new UI
stories.notes: Added direct rail coverage in SessionBootstrap, page-level integration coverage in OperatorWorkspace.integration.test.tsx, and expanded typed client contract coverage in client.test.ts so UI regressions fail at component, integration, and adapter layers.

stories.title: Cover the operator journey with browser-level end-to-end tests
stories.notes: Added an env-selectable Playwright harness plus deterministic specs for the manual-entry negotiation-to-pipeline flow and a mocked pipeline failure path. Direct browser launch in Codex-hosted macOS can still abort before page boot, but the remote-browser path is now first-class and validated: `PW_TEST_CONNECT_WS_ENDPOINT=ws://127.0.0.1:3000/ npm run test:e2e` passes from Codex when the Playwright browser server runs outside the host. A 2026-04-02 follow-up tightened the happy-path approval timing by waiting for the phase action control to become enabled before the final click, and added matching page-level integration coverage for the negotiation-to-verification handoff.

stories.title: Ship performance budgets and a safe rollout path
stories.notes: Lazy-loaded the verification workspace, added manifest-backed bundle budgets enforced by npm run test:budgets, introduced FastAPI rollout controls via MAGIC_AGENTS_FRONTEND_MODE plus the frontend query parameter, and on 2026-04-01 brought the shipped shell CSS back under the existing budget by trimming decorative chrome instead of raising thresholds.
